item.title: Jobon Torch Lighters Recalled Due to Risk of Serious Injury or Death from Fire and Burn Hazards; Violate Mandatory Standard for Multipurpose Lighters
item.company: Online at Amazon.com and Alibaba.com from April 2021 through September 2025 for between $5 and $20.
item.brand: Online at Amazon.com and Alibaba.com from April 2021 through September 2025 for between $5 and $20.
item.summary: This recall involves Jobon butane torch lighters. The lighters have a side ignition trigger and hands-free operation lock. The lighters come in gray/brown, gold/black and camouflage print. "JOBON" is printed on the side of the lighter.
item.affectedPeople: Consumers who purchased: Jobon butane torch lighters.
item.remedy: Consumers should stop using the recalled lighters immediately and contact Jobon Official Store for a full refund. Consumers will be asked to write "RECALLED" in permanent marker on the lighter, submerge it in water in a bowl and send a photo of the marked and submerged lighter to wzzhongbang@yeah.net. Consumers should then dispose of the recalled product in accordance with state and local waste disposal procedures.
item.payoutAmount: Repair, refund, replacement, or other remedy if stated by the CPSC notice
